title: calceolaria glandulosa subsp. alicahuensis
intro: Calceolaria glandulosa subsp. alicahuensis, also known as the Alicahuensis Slipper Flower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Calceolaria genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Calceolaria glandulosa subsp. alicahuensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cough, and soothe digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal benefits.
